name: Fireside Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 chili pepper pod or more, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meats.
2. Add bacon drippings and cook for 5 minutes.
3. Add hot water, tomato puree, Tabasco sauce, chili peppers, onions, garlic; simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and simmer slowly for 1 to 2 hours.
5. Serve with crackers, raw onion, grated sharp Cheddar cheese, and plenty of cold beer.
